allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api-customer.shreeanjani.co.in/tpapi/tracking/" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 25; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "ERR STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $s=$_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); if\($s\){ $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(1500,$sr.BaseStream.Length\)\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\npm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Volta\\bin", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Output $c } }; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs", "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nvm", "C:\\nvm4w", "C:\\tools"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm|volta|fnm' }; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\) -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|nvm|volta|fnm' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\DeoDap\\AppData\\Local" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm|volta|fnm|pnpm|bun|deno' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\DeoDap\\AppData\\Roaming" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|nvm|npm' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
